name: Trent AI
oneliner: Trent AI builds multi-agent security — specialized security agents that continuously scan environments, judge risk, and mitigate vulnerabilities in autonomous AI agent deployments.
finserv: No explicit finserv focus but enterprise-broad. OpenAI, Spotify, Databricks, AWS leaders participate. London base aligns with Europe-preferred geography.
team: Founded by Eno Thereska (CEO), Neil Lawrence (chief scientist), Zhenwen Dai (CTO) — former Amazon/AWS and Spotify engineering leaders. Seed led by LocalGlobe and Cambridge Innovation Capital.
thesis: Trent AI addresses agent-level security (not model-level), passing the 'AI, not agents' test. Multi-agent security with context-driven judgement layer is architecturally aligned with governing third-party agents. London base is thesis-preferred. The risk is whether this is perceived as enterprise security tooling or external agent governance infrastructure.
